0 means unlimited. The value is converte: 0 means unlimited. The value is converted to quota units when saved.
APIv3 Key is used to decrypt payment not: APIv3 Key is used to decrypt payment notifications. It is different from PUB_KEY_ID.
Configure AppID and AppSecret from WeCha: Configure AppID and AppSecret from WeChat Official Account basic settings.
Configure merchant credentials from WeCh: Configure merchant credentials from WeChat Pay merchant platform.
Public key mode does not use APIv3 Key f: Public key mode does not use APIv3 Key for response signature verification. Keep it only if encrypted notifications need to be decrypted.
Configure Alipay merchant credentials fo: Configure Alipay merchant credentials for wallet recharge.
Configure WeChat Pay merchant credential: Configure WeChat Pay merchant credentials for wallet top-up.
Create a Price in the Stripe dashboard f: Create a Price in the Stripe dashboard for this plan, then paste the Price ID here.
Create a Product in the Creem dashboard: Create a Product in the Creem dashboard for this plan, then paste the Product ID here.
Display name is fixed by the selected pa: Display name is fixed by the selected payment channel.
Displayed on the wallet page only when a: Displayed on the wallet page only when at least one amount-based payment gateway is enabled.
Enable a gateway first, then fill in the: Enable a gateway first, then fill in the required configuration fields.
Enable a payment channel first, then fil: Enable a payment channel first, then fill in the required configuration fields.
Enable Alipay payment method for wallet: Enable Alipay payment method for wallet top-up.
Enable WeChat Pay payment method for wal: Enable WeChat Pay payment method for wallet top-up.
Enabled third-party payment channels may: Enabled third-party payment channels may require provider-specific product IDs. Waffo Pancake can create one automatically; Stripe and Creem currently require IDs from their dashboards.
I have completed payment, refresh wallet: I have completed payment, refresh wallet
Leave blank to use the system callback a: Leave blank to use the system callback address
Log in to WeChat Official Account Platfo: Log in to WeChat Official Account Platform, then go to Development > Basic Configuration > Server Configuration and paste this URL.
Merchant API certificate serial number (: Merchant API certificate serial number (auto parsed)
Certificate content loaded. Upload a new: Certificate content loaded. Upload a new apiclient_cert.pem to replace it.
Only used by the legacy Epay gateway. Na: Only used by the legacy Epay gateway. Native Alipay and WeChat Pay are configured in their own gateway tabs.
Optional. WeChat Pay Native payment uses: Optional. WeChat Pay Native payment uses this URL for asynchronous payment notifications.
Optional. Leave blank when apiclient_cer: Optional. Leave blank when apiclient_cert.pem is provided; the system will parse it automatically.
Paste apiclient_cert.pem content. The me: Paste apiclient_cert.pem content. The merchant API certificate serial number can be parsed from it.
Public key mode uses PUB_KEY_ID and the: Public key mode uses PUB_KEY_ID and the WeChat Pay public key for response verification.
Stored as base USD per request. The bill: Stored as base USD per request. The billing rule preview follows the current display currency.
Sync vendors from icons and model names: Sync vendors from icons and model names
Price per 1M input tokens in the selecte: Price per 1M input tokens in the selected display currency.
Price per 1M tokens in the selected disp: Price per 1M tokens in the selected display currency.
Cost per request in the selected display: Cost per request in the selected display currency. It is saved internally as USD.
Use WeChat to scan the QR code and compl: Use WeChat to scan the QR code and complete payment.
Enter the AppID of the Official Account,: Enter the AppID of the Official Account, Mini Program, or WeChat Open Platform website application bound to the WeChat merchant ID. Native QR payment only requires AppID; AppSecret is only used for WeChat login, web authorization, or JSAPI payment.
Exchange uses the current system rate at: Exchange uses the current system rate at redeem time.
